steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: The blank must give graph data on 1986 mean forest patch sizes, which had dropped considerably. The completing evidence must give the smallest 1986 range across classes.

steps.title: Match the data
steps.content: At 1986, the graph shows mean patch sizes ranging from roughly 0 to 50 hectares — the lowest range, consistent with a considerable drop. The other upper bounds (125, 150, 250) far exceed the values observed. That confirms D is correct.
